[WORKED] Branch already merged to main — retroactive review confirmed all 15 commits clean. CSS isolation (33 selectors scoped) and data-testid on 17 panels verified.
Automated merge-detection in QA tasks — if branch already merged, skip build test and do retroactive diff review only.
ExportDialog #1f1f2a→#222 fix confirmed in cut-ux. DAGProjectPanel #5DCAA5 still present — separate fix task needed.
Auto-check that all imports in services/ are either in requirements.txt or wrapped in try/except — dependency contract test
scipy hard import at cut_audio_analyzer.py:139 without try/except — will crash if called without scipy installed. scipy not in requirements.txt.
[BUG] HistoryPanel labels type mismatch: backend returns [{index,label,timestamp}] but frontend expected string[]. Rendered [object Object]. Fixed with union type + typeof guard.
[WORKED] Workspace presets audit: perfect 1:1 match between MenuBar entries, PRESET_BUILDERS keys, and WorkspacePresetName type. Zero gaps.
HistoryPanel should subscribe to WebSocket timeline_undo/timeline_redo events instead of 3s polling. Instant refresh after Cmd+Z.
HistoryPanel labels type mismatch: backend returns [{index,label,timestamp}] but frontend expected string[]. Rendered [object Object]. Fixed with union type + typeof guard.
[WORKED] Sonnet Explore agent with 47 tool calls found all monochrome violations + dead code in a single pass. Comprehensive audit without spending Opus context.

MenuBar had dead SpeedControl code path: lazy import + useState + render block. setSpeedControlOpen(true) was never called anywhere — SpeedControl is actually rendered via CutEditorLayoutV2 + store.showSpeedControl.
[BUG] ExportDialog SocketIO task (tb_1774410674_1) was already fully implemented — socket.io import, render_progress listener, progress bar + ETA + cancel. Closed without code changes.
[WORKED] Sonnet verify-before-code saved wasted effort on ExportDialog. 50% of tasks continue to be already-done.
DAGProjectPanel Camelot key could use dynamic brightness from the Camelot wheel position (1A=bright, 12B=dim) instead of static #999. Data-driven brightness encoding.
ExportDialog SocketIO task (tb_1774410674_1) was already fully implemented — socket.io import, render_progress listener, progress bar + ETA + cancel. Closed without code changes.
[BUG] Keyframe detection uses 20ms tolerance (0.02s) for time matching. At high frame rates (120fps) this is ~2.4 frames — may need tighter tolerance. Backend B71 uses 1ms.

Keyframe graph editor — mini canvas below each slider showing value curves over clip duration. Click to add control points. FCP7 Keyframe Editor reference (Ch.57). Would need ~200 lines of canvas draw

matchFrame sets sourceMarkIn to the matched time — FCP7 doesn't set marks on match frame, only seeks source monitor. Consider removing setSourceMarkIn call for strict FCP7 compliance.

1) superimpose fell back to V1 when no V2 lane existed — silent wrong behavior, not a crash. Fixed: auto-create V2 lane. 2) fitToFill backend op omitted speed parameter — local clip had speed but backend would lose it on refresh. Fixed: added speed to op + skipRefresh.
